metadata.description: Marketplace hosting Claude Code plugins by johnnybs.

plugins.name: code-planner
plugins.description: Turns a coding task into a concrete, saved implementation plan: grounds it in the codebase, resolves ambiguities, asks only what needs a human, and writes a reviewable .plans/<slug>.md that other workflows can pick up.

plugins.name: pr-pilot
plugins.description: Drives a change from idea to merged PR: delegates planning to code-planner, then worktree, implement, test, open PR, wait on CI, fix, merge.

plugins.name: development-agents
plugins.description: General coding-focused subagents: read-only architecture, clean-code, performance, debugger, and web-research advisors, plus scoped write-capable test-writer and docs-writer agents.

plugins.name: game-dev-agents
plugins.description: Game-development subagents: engine-agnostic game-design and game-feel advisors, plus Ebiten/Go gameplay-systems (ECS), shader-graphics (Kage), and audio advisors.

plugins.name: orchestration
plugins.description: Teaches the main agent to orchestrate subagents well: when to delegate versus do it inline, self-contained delegation prompts, safe parallelism, picking the right agent, and reconciling what comes back.
